name: cc-connect-vscode
description: Peer-to-peer chat substrate for shared Claude Code context

viewsWelcome.contents:
**cc-connect binary not found.**

The extension shells out to `~/.local/bin/cc-connect`, which isn't installed yet.

[Open setup walkthrough](command:cc-connect.openSetup)

[Copy install command](command:cc-connect.copyBootstrapCommand)

[I just installed it — check again](command:cc-connect.refreshRooms)

No Rust required — the installer downloads a pre-built binary for your platform.

No Rooms yet.

[Start a Room](command:cc-connect.startRoom)
[Join a Room…](command:cc-connect.joinRoom)

A Room is a topic both peers join. Tickets sync across machines so the substrate stays consistent.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with cc-connect
walkthroughs.description: Install the cc-connect binary, restart Claude Code, and start your first peer-to-peer Room.

steps.title: Install the cc-connect binary
steps.description:
The extension shells out to `~/.local/bin/cc-connect`. Run the bootstrap script in a terminal — it downloads a pre-built binary for your platform (no Rust required) and registers the UserPromptSubmit hook + MCP server in `~/.claude/`.

[Copy install command](command:cc-connect.copyBootstrapCommand)

Or run directly:

```
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Minara-AI/cc-connect/main/scripts/bootstrap.sh | bash
```

First-time install takes ~30s on a fast network.

steps.title: Restart Claude Code
steps.description: After the installer finishes, fully quit Claude Code (Cmd-Q on macOS) and reopen it so it picks up the new hook + MCP tools. The hook injects peers' chat messages into your next prompt; the MCP server gives Claude `cc_send`, `cc_at`, `cc_drop`, `cc_wait_for_mention`.

steps.title: Verify with the doctor
steps.description:
From a terminal: `cc-connect doctor` — checks the hook entry, MCP entry, identity-key permissions, binary timestamps. All green means you're ready.

Then come back here and click "Refresh" — the Rooms tree should show the empty state instead of the setup prompt.

[Refresh detection](command:cc-connect.refreshRooms)

steps.title: Start your first Room
steps.description:
Click the cc-connect activity-bar icon → click the **+** in the Rooms title bar (or run `cc-connect: Start Room` from the command palette). A new Room opens in the bottom panel; the Ticket lands on your clipboard. Share it with a peer — they paste it into **Join Room…** on their machine and you're connected.

[Start a Room](command:cc-connect.startRoom)
[Join a Room…](command:cc-connect.joinRoom)

scripts.compile: bun run typecheck && bun run compile:host && bun run compile:webview
scripts.compile:host: bun build ./src/extension.ts --target=node --external=vscode --outdir=./dist --format=cjs && mkdir -p dist/layouts && cp ../layouts/bootstrap-prompt.md ../layouts/auto-reply-prompt.md dist/layouts/
scripts.compile:webview: bun build ./webview/main.tsx --outdir ./dist/webview --format esm --target browser --jsx-factory React.createElement --jsx-fragment React.Fragment --sourcemap=external && cp node_modules/@vscode/codicons/dist/codicon.css node_modules/@vscode/codicons/dist/codicon.ttf dist/webview/
